---
title: "project_fishtest.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\integration\project_fishtest.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.88
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.57
---

## Intent
The `project_fishtest.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on GungnirSPRT, __init__, evaluate_delta. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GungnirSPRT, __init__, evaluate_delta. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [math](file://math)

### Exports
- `GungnirSPRT`
- `__init__`
- `evaluate_delta`
